currentFocus: PatchBench online-readiness helper wave, public-state evidence sanity, and rebuild/spec roadmap indexing are integrated on main; docs/state now point the next slice at DTO-based PatchBench helper-output tests.

publicMain.nextWriteRequirement: Re-read live git truth before treating any exact main commit as current; unmerged local campaign hashes and local campaign paths are not durable public state.

acceptedIntegrationEvidence.summary: Public state no longer depends on older local-only worker/source hashes.
ROADMAP-INDEX now lists the static-to-proof rebuild transition backlog.

currentDocsTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo is the normal collaboration surface, not a sparse export.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, documentation_agent_state.json, and re_orchestrator_state.json record the accepted integration wave, keep concise current-state pointers and non-claims, and avoid local campaign paths.
currentDocsTruth.pathOwnershipIncident: Repaired helper-worker path-ownership incident is a non-blocking integration note: the accidental canonical static-test edit was reverted before integration and canonical main was clean before this merge.
currentDocsTruth.crossReviewFollowUp: Future substantive PatchBench helper changes should add representative DTO-based helper-output tests that catch omitted, swapped, or boundary-losing text-state fields.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildSpecIndexing: ROADMAP-INDEX links the active static-to-proof rebuild/spec proof queue; this is discoverability only, not rebuild/runtime/visual/gameplay parity proof.
currentDocsTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release, tag, package, signing, installer, announcement, hosted workflow, or publication action is part of this integration.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Presentation helper extraction, docs/state hash repair, and docs-only roadmap index integration only; no AppCore, patch catalog row, byte patch, launch argument, safe-copy manifest/signature, runtime proof, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim change.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, package output, local runtime caches, local campaign logs, active coordination identifiers, raw proof evidence, and local proof paths stay out of tracked docs/state.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

validation.currentIntegration: Integration gates cover docs/repo, payload, WinUI, focused PatchBench, broader PatchBench, patch-engine, hard-payload, and primary-lane validation evidence.
validation.nextSlice: Prefer focused DTO-based PatchBench helper-output tests before broader BinaryPatchesPage modularity work; a later docs/checker slice can add a compact rebuild-front-door chain map.

nextSteps: Before the next write, verify live HEAD, origin/main, and remote refs/heads/main.
Add representative DTO-based tests for the PatchBench online-readiness helper before substantive helper-output changes.

Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
